block_reason: The fixed EEA PM10 E1a daily source reported downloadable files for BE, NL, but the reproducible URL-list endpoint returned zero URLs for those countries. The PM10 coverage gate cannot be run fairly from a complete public manifest.
claim_boundary: EEA AQ D-001 reports only manual-track source-readiness and PM10 daily coverage status under the fixed protocol.

fixed_scope.coverage_gate: at least 85 percent daily coverage per sampling point
fixed_scope.selection_rule: first five eligible sampling points per country after sorting by country code, city/locality if available, and sampling point ID

known_limitations: No air-quality forecasting claim is made.
No deployment or production suitability claim is made.
No raw EEA payload files are committed.
raw_payload_policy: Raw EEA payload files stay outside the public repository.

result.reason: The fixed EEA PM10 E1a daily source reported downloadable files for BE, NL, but the reproducible URL-list endpoint returned zero URLs for those countries. The PM10 coverage gate cannot be run fairly from a complete public manifest.

fixed_request.coverage_gate: at least 85 percent daily coverage per sampling point
fixed_request.selection_rule: first five eligible sampling points per country after sorting by country code, city/locality if available, and sampling point ID

source_probe.raw_payload_policy: No raw EEA parquet payloads or URL manifests are committed.
